claim_boundary: The preserved default baseline is GeometryFlowMatchingHead: a geometry-first coordinate-velocity head, not a full molecular flow. Atom-pocket cross-attention and pairwise geometry are config-selectable ablations, not promoted defaults.

baseline.role: Preserved Q2 baseline for architecture audits and public-baseline comparison.
baseline.capability: Predicts per-atom Cartesian velocity from centered coordinates, x0 coordinates, displacement, timestep features, mean-pooled modality summaries, and gate summaries.
limitations: No joint atom-type or bond flow.
Pocket, topology, and geometry conditioning are collapsed to mean summaries inside the baseline velocity head.

feature_audit.evidence: GeometryFlowMatchingHead uses coordinate, x0, displacement, timestep, conditioning, and gate projections followed by fusion and velocity_head linear layers.
mean_or_zeros is called for topology_context, geometry_context, and pocket_context before conditioning_projection.

AtomPocketCrossAttentionVelocityHead implements gate(atom,pocket) * Attention(Q_atom,K_pocket,V_pocket), and Phase1ResearchSystem selects it when model.flow_velocity_head.kind is atom_pocket_cross_attention.
feature_audit.claim_scope: Ablation-only unless a claim-bearing config explicitly selects atom_pocket_cross_attention; geometry remains the default.

feature_audit.evidence: PairwiseGeometryMessagePassing provides bounded radius/top-k message construction and is injected by GeometryFlowMatchingHead::new_with_pairwise when model.pairwise_geometry.enabled is true.
feature_audit.claim_scope: Ablation-only; it augments coordinate velocity prediction and does not create topology or bond flow.

feature_audit.evidence: rotation_augmentation_config_plan.json is a design artifact; implemented tests currently cover translation invariance for the baseline head.
FlowMatchingTrainingRecord targets coordinates only and target_velocity is x1 - x0.
GeometryFlowMatchingHead outputs [num_atoms, 3] velocity; atom type and bond structure are handled outside the flow objective.
Flow rollout applies configured pocket-envelope correction in the generation path, so constrained_flow must be separated from raw_flow.
Existing generation artifacts expose raw_rollout, repaired, inferred_bond, deterministic_proxy, and reranked layers; q2_layer_attribution_contract adds raw_flow and constrained_flow semantics.

claim_rules: Report the default baseline as geometry-first flow matching.
Do not claim full molecular flow, topology flow, or bond generation from the baseline.
Report local pocket attention and pairwise geometry as config-selected ablations unless the active config explicitly selects them.
Separate raw model-native output from constrained sampling and postprocessing layers.
